sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-12 07:21
- Distance: 6.9 km
- Moving time: 40:07
- Elapsed time: 41:22
- Elevation gain: 137 m
- Average heart rate: 161.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 222.1 W
- Average speed: 10.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `161.4 bpm`, ranging from `101.0` to `174.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `155.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `166.8 bpm` (+10.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `158.3 spm`, with a working range of `107.0` to `180.0 spm` after excluding `7` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `160.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `154.1 spm` (-6.5 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:50 /km` across `6.875 km` in `40:07` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:53 /km` and second-half pace was `5:48 /km` (-5 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `161.3 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `155.8 bpm` in the first half and `166.9 bpm` in the second (+11.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `40:07` out of `41:22` elapsed (97.0%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `0.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `143.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.6 m` and `88.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `74.8 m` in the first half and `68.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
